# VDownloader Screenshots

This folder contains screenshots for the README.md file.

## Required Images

Place the following images here:

1. `android.png` - Screenshot of the Android app
2. `desktop.png` - Screenshot of the Desktop app

## How to Add Screenshots

1. Take a screenshot of the Android app
2. Take a screenshot of the Desktop app
3. Rename them to match the filenames above
4. Place them in this folder
5. Commit and push to GitHub

## Note

The screenshots should show:
- The main UI with dark theme
- Quality selection buttons
- Download progress (optional)
